creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to phryk-ports from comment #2)

We branch stable/14 in 4 hours...  And so it will be in 14.0. As for a back port to what will become 13.3, I can't say what needs to be merged, or who fixed it. You might be able to get some info on that if you bisect where it was fixed in -current, though maybe it was never broken in -current. Good luck.
